name: Obscene Blown Kiss
outcome: The purple slime woman winks before touching her soft lips with two fingers and smooching them with a teasing flourish. With a trailing tempting coo, the wet smack sends a floating heart that zips toward you in a rapid line and hits you squarely, sending a hot wave of melty enchanting tingles across your skin as the feeling of soft kisses radiates out all over your body!
miss: The purple slime woman winks before touching her soft lips with two fingers and smooching them with a teasing flourish. With a trailing tempting coo, the wet smack sends a floating heart that zips toward you in a rapid line, but you manage to evade the pulsing projectile!
statusOutcome: The erodingly enchanted kiss melts into your senses like an indulgent whispering temptation, filling you with shivering aching need...
